name: steve-jobs
description: 91 sj-prefixed operating skills for product craft, Jony Ive design studio practice, storytelling, hiring, strategy, learning, and failure review.

interface.shortDescription: 91 Steve Jobs and Jony Ive operating skills for product, design, story, people, strategy, learning, and failure review.
interface.longDescription: A compact pack of 91 sj-prefixed skills that help agents choose, apply, capture, and refresh Steve Jobs-derived and Jony Ive design-studio operating lenses for product craft, simplification, tactile design, storytelling, hiring, strategy, learning, and anti-pattern review. Each skill is self-contained, public-safe, and usable as a Codex plugin or as loose skill folders in compatible harnesses.
defaultPrompt: Use $sj-core-catalog to choose the right SJ skill sequence for this task.
Use $sj-product-simplify-to-one to reduce this product idea to one clear job.
Use $sj-ive-humanize-technology to make this interface feel less cold and more approachable.
